message:
fix(stability): add Display impls and as_str() for verdict types, replace Debug formatting

Add const fn as_str() and fmt::Display implementations to RegExpVerdict
and ShippedPathVerdict enums, then replace Debug formatting (format!("{:?}",
verdict)) with verdict.as_str().to_string() in evidence bundle event
writers.

Debug formatting is not guaranteed stable across compiler versions and
produces capitalized variant names ("Pass", "Fail") vs the lowercase
canonical forms ("pass", "fail") expected by downstream consumers.
The explicit as_str() method provides a stable, self-documenting
serialization contract.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
